top_signals.title: Hugging Face warns an autonomous AI agent hacked its network
top_signals.summary: The Hugging Face artificial intelligence repository disclosed that attackers gained access to internal datasets and credentials after breaching its production infrastructure using an autonomous AI agent system. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today

top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: U.S. attacks deepen hardship, not dissent, in Iran’s restive south
top_signals.summary: Bordering the Strait of Hormuz, southern Iran has been a major target of U.S. attacks on ports, energy facilities and transport infrastructure.

top_signals.title: Korean Stock Traders Slash Margin Loans to Lowest Since April
top_signals.summary: South Korean investors slashed their leveraged stock positions to the lowest level in three months, as memory-chip losses halted the market’s rally.
